title: 150CM Artificial Palm Tree Indoor Plant Tall Fake Tropical Paradise Palm Tree in Pot with Real Bark Design Faux Areca Palm Tree for Home Office Living Room Bedroom Farmhouse Modern Decor 1pcs
features: This highly realistic artificial palm tree is made of durable and premium polyester material,the black pot base is covered by green wood chaff and hand-planted with real tree bark which is more realistic and natural than faux plastic bark, "looks so real, they're nearly green live plants!"

This 150cm tall artificial palm tree has 13 smooth pristine trunks connected with up to 362 arching feather-like leaves with realistic texture, providing your coastal decor with an authentic and natural look that will last a lifetime,no watering or trimming,looks full and fresh every day

This dypsis lutescens palm tree with UV Resistant technology, it will create a sunny atmosphere wherever you place it, it is the perfect decoration for indoor & outside, home, bedroom, office, patio, farmhouse, porch, balcony, entrance, fireplace, doorway, stairway, green garden, yard, dining room, living room, modern aesthetic decor, etc

Overall Product Dimensions: 42"Depth x 42"Width x 60"Height; Pot Dimensions: 6"Depth x 6"Width x 5"Height; Measurements calculated from each furthest outstretched dimension (It depends on how much you bend the branches), the black pot is made of solid cement which to prevent children, pets knock it down

Easily create a natural- looking shape, all the branches are outfitted with sturdy metal wires so they could be adjusted different position as needed, It is nestled inside an 6 inch black plastic planter pot for versatile appeal, but you can always tuck it into another beautiful planter pot of your choice so it fits right into your ensemble

No matter it's for the living room, bathroom, nursery room, study room, or business places like restaurants, offices, coffee shops, clothing shops, our artificial tree is perfect for decoration for places as above.
